creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-11-29 21:03:12 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    x11                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    x11/xmobar           Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Xmobar is a minimalistic text based status bar. Inspired by the Ion3 status
  bar, it supports similar features, like dynamic color management, output
  templates, and extensibility through plugins.
  
  WWW: http://code.haskell.org/~arossato/xmobar
  
  PR:             ports/129191
  Submitted by:   Samy Al Bahra <sbahra at kerneled.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.695     +1 -0      ports/x11/Makefile
  1.1       +38 -0     ports/x11/xmobar/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/x11/xmobar/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/x11/xmobar/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/x11/xmobar/pkg-plist (new)
